The Erosion of "Deep Work" and Sustained Attention
The hallmark of higher-order cognitive development is the ability to engage in "deep work"—the capacity to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task.

sentence: The attention economy, conversely, thrives on *interruption*.

The Outsourcing of Metacognition
In developmental psychology, we talk about *metacognition*—the ability to think about one's own thinking.
